title: Selene Base: Pressurized Footprint Layout
strategies: single best tile: occupy the one highest-net tile (the weak connected baseline)
single-deposit region growing: seed at the global best and annex the best positive frontier tile until the budget runs out or the frontier turns net-negative
multi-seed region growing + budget-aware deposit bridging (Dijkstra on max(0,-net) bridge cost) + negative-leaf pruning
restart / local-search over which deposits to connect, spending scarce budget on negative bridge tiles only when the second deposit pays for it
